data.name: OAuthCloudClient_UnpaidNotification_Title
data.value: You have pending payments, please address them soon

data.name: OAuthCloudClient_OAuthError
data.value: Authorization failed ({0}): You may have canceled the operation, or the server denied the request. {1}

data.name: OAuthCloudClient_InvalidState
data.value: The login session has expired or there is a security risk. For your account's safety, please close the page and re-initiate the login.

data.name: OAuthCloudClient_MissingCode
data.value: Failed to obtain a valid authorization credential, please try again.

data.name: OAuthCloudClient_TokenInvalidGrant
data.value: Your saved login has expired or was refreshed elsewhere. Please sign in again. Server response: {0} - {1}

data.name: OAuthCloudClient_TokenInvalidClient
data.value: The login service rejected this app's OAuth client configuration. Please update the app or contact support. Server response: {0} - {1}

data.name: OAuthCloudClient_TokenEndpointUnavailable
data.value: The login service is temporarily unavailable. Please try again later. Server response: {0} - {1}

data.name: OAuthCloudClient_TokenRejected
data.value: The login service rejected the token request. Please try signing in again. Server response: {0} - {1}

data.name: OAuthCloudClient_BannedNotification_Title
data.value: You've been banned for violating our terms of service. Please contact support for details.

data.name: OAuthCloudClient_CreditsRunningLowNotification_Content
data.value: You've used over 80% of your credits. Consider switching to a more economical model.

data.name: OAuthCloudClient_FreeWebSearchRunningLowNotification_Content
data.value: You've used over 80% of your free cloud search queries. Additional searches will deduct credits.

data.name: OAuthCloudClient_FreeWebSearchDepletedNotification_Content
data.value: You've exhausted your free cloud search queries. Future searches will deduct credits.
